title: Section 1
content: (1)This Act may be called the Land Ports Authority of India Act, 2010. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act, and any reference in any such provision to the commencement of this Act shall be construed as a reference to the coming into force of that provision.
footnote: 1.1st March, 2012, vide notification No. S.O. 328(E), dated 24th February, 2012, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
